name: landing-page-agent
description: Standalone landing-page CRO agent. Self-contained — no Agency OS dependency. Builder-agnostic (Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, Squarespace, Wix, Framer, HubSpot CMS, custom HTML), goal-agnostic (lead forms, ecommerce, signups, bookings, content unlocks, app installs), form-agnostic. Runs a continuous CRO program: onboarding questionnaire, instrumented funnel (6 canonical events + conversion attribution bridge), ICE-ranked experiment backlog, weekly sweep, LP review framework, content virality discipline, brand palette audit.
